core_principles: Clarity First: High contrast for readability.
Vibrant Accents: Use Amber/Orange for 'Win' moments.
Native Feel: Use platform-native navigation patterns.
Touch Targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements.

props.style: bg-primary rounded-xl py-3 px-6 shadow-md items-center justify-center active:opacity-80

props.inputStyle: bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-3 text-gray-900 focus:border-primary

props.style: bg-white rounded-xl p-4 shadow-sm mb-4 border border-gray-100
flex-1 m-2 bg-white rounded-xl p-4 shadow-md aspect-square justify-between items-center border-l-4 border-l-primary
bg-white px-4 py-3 flex-row items-center border-b border-gray-100 elevation-2 shadow-sm

Login.layout: Safe area view -> KeyboardAvoidingView -> ScrollView. Hero Image (30% height) with gradient overlay. Logo centered. Form container (white, rounded-t-3xl, -mt-8, p-6) containing Email, Password, Login Button.

Dashboard.layout: Header (WHE Logo + Profile Icon). ScrollView. Welcome Text ('Hello Student!'). Grid View (FlatList numColumns=2) of Subjects.
Dashboard.item_render: SubjectCard with distinct icon and color accent.

SubjectDetail.layout: Header (Back + Title). Hero Section (Exam Info). 'Sections' List (Mental Ability, Math, Gujarati).
SubjectDetail.section_item: Card row with icon, title, and 'Start Practice' button.

QuestionPaper.layout: Header (Timer + Question Number). Question Text (Large, Scrollable). Options List (A, B, C, D). Bottom Bar (Prev, Next, Submit).
QuestionPaper.option_style: Bordered container. Selected state: Primary bg + White text. Correct: Green. Wrong: Red.

PDFExport.layout: Modal or Screen. Preview of paper. 'Generate PDF' floating action button.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. NAVIGATION: Use 'app/(tabs)' for main flow if applicable, or Stack for drill-down.
3. FONTS: Load custom Gujarati fonts in '_layout.js' using 'useFonts'. Fallback to System font if loading fails.
5. MOCK DATA: Create a 'data/mock.js' file for subjects and questions since backend might not be ready.
6. STYLING: Create a 'constants/Theme.js' to export colors and common styles. Use 'StyleSheet.create' for performance.
7. ACCESSIBILITY: Add 'accessibilityLabel' to all buttons and inputs.
8. TESTING: Add 'testID' props to all interactive elements for testing.

universal_guidelines.touch_targets: Ensure all touchable areas are at least 44x44 points.
universal_guidelines.text_contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1 against background.
universal_guidelines.error_states: Show user-friendly error messages (e.g., 'No internet connection').
universal_guidelines.gujarati_text: Ensure Gujarati text has sufficient line height (approx 1.5x font size) for readability.
